remaining_tasks.name: CFG-01: API key → .env + providers map entry (setup.rs)

decisions.decision: API key written to .env via write_env_var_to_dotenv + providers.{provider}.api_key_env in config.yaml
decisions.rationale: Canonical Phase 26 schema; eliminates deprecated model.api_key field and gateway deprecation warning

decisions.decision: Static KNOWN_AUX_PROVIDERS list for auxiliary provider validation
decisions.rationale: Simpler than live lookup; catches user typos like 'local' before they crash ProviderResolver

decisions.decision: run_preflight gate widens to Chat | Gateway | None only; is_interactive_repl and is_chat_or_bare stay unchanged
decisions.rationale: Gateway needs setup guard but is not an interactive REPL — must keep ironhermes=info log filter

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 26.4.1 — all 3 plans are ready, Wave 1 (plans 01 + 03) can run in parallel
context_notes: Phase was inserted as placeholder with TBD goal. Goal was clarified via user bug report during this session. All 3 bugs are localized to 3 files: setup.rs (plans 01+02), main.rs (plan 03). Plan checker found 1 warning (plan 03 task 1 verify command) which was fixed directly before committing.
